title: Leioligo salicina
taxonomy: Leioligo salicina is classified within the phylum Mollusca. It belongs to the class Gastropoda and is more specifically classified as a species within the family Leilopidae. The family Leilopidae is part of the order Vermetoidea. Leioligo salicina can be further classified as a genus within the order Vermetoidea. It is a species of sea snail.
